infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TimmyTime tracks your distance from items you've left behind so it can remind you to go back.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TimmyTime needs background location to alert you when you've walked away from a tracked item.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TimmyTime uses the camera to scan barcodes and photograph items you want to remember.
